_notes: Copy this file to DeployConfig.json and fill in your environment settings.
DeployConfig.json is excluded from the repository - this example file is the template.
=== Network ===
ShareRoot: UNC path to your deployment share.
DriveLetter: Drive letter to map the share to in WinPE (Z: recommended).
ImagesSubfolder: Subfolder under ShareRoot containing stock install.wim files.
DriversSubfolder: Subfolder under ShareRoot containing driver ZIPs.
AppTitle: Displayed in the title bar and window caption.
OrgName: Your organization name (used in unattend.xml RegisteredOrganization).
DefaultDomainPrefix: Pre-fills the username field (e.g. DOMAIN\).
=== Deployment ===
DefaultImageIndex: 1 for stock Microsoft WIMs (standard).
DefaultTargetDisk: Physical disk number to image (0 = first disk).
AutoRebootSeconds: Countdown before auto-reboot after deployment.
ComputerNameTemplate: Computer name with variables. Use %SERVICETAG%, %MODEL%, %VENDOR%.
Example: 'PC-%SERVICETAG%' -> 'PC-ABC1234'. Max 15 chars (Windows limit).
Leave empty to let Windows auto-name the machine.
DomainName: Active Directory domain FQDN (e.g. corp.example.com). Leave empty to skip join.
DomainOU: Target OU for computer object (e.g. OU=Workstations,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com).
ProductKey: MAK or retail product key (XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX). Leave empty to skip.
Timezone: Must match a valid Windows timezone name (run 'tzutil /l' for full list).
InputLocale: Keyboard layout (e.g. 0409:00000409 for US English).
SystemLocale: System locale (e.g. en-US).
UserLocale: User locale (e.g. en-US).
WifiSSID: WiFi network name to auto-connect after setup. Leave empty to skip.
WifiPassword: WiFi password (WPA2-PSK). Stored in SetupComplete.cmd - clear after deploy if needed.
=== Apps ===
Apps: Array of applications to install via SetupComplete.cmd after Windows setup.
Each app object has: Name, Path (relative to SharePath), Args (silent install switches).
Apps are installed in order. Each install is logged to C:\DynamicPxE\Logs\SetupComplete.log.
SharePath: UNC path to app repository (public share, no credentials needed).
DriveLetter: Drive letter to map app share to (Y: recommended, must differ from deploy share).
=== Theme / Layout / Branding ===
See ThemeEngine.ps1 for all available color keys and defaults.

Colors._comment: Hex color overrides - see ThemeEngine.ps1 for all keys
